description:
Qwen3.7 Max is a next‑generation flagship model designed for the agent‑centric era, with its core strengths lying in the breadth and depth of its agent‑level capabilities: it excels at programming, office and productivity tasks, and long‑term autonomous execution.
This model is served by Alibaba Cloud Int. from Singapore.

Notes:
- Context Window: 1,000,000
- Text only input

This bot supports optional parameters for additional customization.
